data.content: Implementation complete on branch worktree-bf85-stream-beats (commit 7cf555b5). Changes: beats-multi-repo.ts adds streamBeatsAcrossRegisteredRepos() async generator with race-and-yield pattern. API route serves NDJSON when Accept: application/x-ndjson for scope=all. New ndjson-stream.ts reusable consumer. api.ts adds fetchBeatsForScopeStreaming(). use-beats-query.ts does incremental cache merge via setQueryData(). 3 new test files with 13 tests. All quality gates pass: lint 0 errors, tsc 0 errors, 231 tests pass, build succeeds.
